active.name: Wall Walk
active.effects: Become ghostly for 6 seconds, ignoring terrain collision until you basic attack or cast an ability. While inside terrain, gain {{as|300 '''bonus''' movement speed}}.

effects_structured.raw: Become ghostly for 6 seconds, ignoring terrain collision until you basic attack or cast an ability
While inside terrain, gain {{as 300 '''bonus''' movement speed}}.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Wall Walk is an active with 15-second cooldown that grants ghosted terrain traversal for up to 6 seconds and ends early on basic attack or ability cast.
Player-visible behavior: while inside terrain during Wall Walk, the holder gains +300 bonus movement speed.
Data reconciliation note: page-level sell value (250) differs from Tier-1 dataset sell value (350); retained Tier-1 baseline pending canonical mode-specific economy policy.
